account_banned:
Account Suspended Your account has been suspended from this platform.
If you believe this is a mistake, please contact our support team — we review every case and respond promptly.
bot_already_exists: This bot is already registered on the platform.
bot_limit_reached:
Bot Limit Reached You've hit the maximum number of bots on your current plan. Current usage: {current}/{limit}
Upgrade your plan to connect more bots and keep growing.
fallback_message:
Hmm, I wasn't sure what to do with that. {e_question}

Use the menu below to get back on track.
generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
generic_error_toast: ❌ Something went wrong. Please try again.
invalid_token_format: Invalid bot token. Please check and try again.
maintenance:
{e_wrench} Scheduled Maintenance The platform is briefly offline for updates. We'll be back online very shortly!
Thank you for your patience — we're working to make things better.
maintenance_msg: {e_warning} Platform is under maintenance. Try again shortly.
token_api_error: Token Validation Failed Couldn't verify your bot token with Telegram. Possible reasons: • The token might be incorrect • The bot may have been deleted in @BotFather • Telegram API temporarily unavailable Double-check your token or generate a fresh one at @BotFather.
user_not_found: User not found. Please send /start to register.
